title: MantrRaj Straw Rolled Beach Mat 70 x 180cm for Outdoor and Camping, Perfect for Beach or Garden - Random Color
features: SUMMER TIME SIMPLE AND EFFECTIVE : This beach mat with solar lining is perfect for those hot days at the beach and sunny days out to the park! The Mat Is Designed In A Way That Nothing Can Really Go Wrong. It is Extremely Easy to Use, Can Be Quickly Rolled Away And Up.

CONVENIENT COMFY AND STYLISH : The mat is easy to roll up and lightweight to carry, also the picnic mat rolls tightly into the perfect size to slip into a beach bag, or side pouch. Extremely Simple But Comfortable. Suitable Both For Sunbathing Or Relaxation Techniques, Such As Yoga. Also, The Coloured Edge Trims Provide A Nice Little Touch Of Style To This Classic Design.

COMFY EASY TO CARRY : Excellent for sun bathing on the beach, picnics in the park, or just lounging in the garden. Extremely Handy. When It's Rolled Up, It's Small Size And Light Weight Make Is Unbelievably Easy To Carry, Transport And Store.

PERFECT FOR BEACH OR GARDEN : The Best Choice For Basking In The Sun, Whether On A Sandy Beach Or In Your Garden. Just Unroll It And You Are Ready To Unwind. Simple, Effective, Classy .At approximately 1.8 metres long and 0.7 metres wide, the beach mat is ideal for most beach goers and sunbathers. Universal Size That Should Accommodate Men And Women Of All Age Groups.
ASSORTED COLOURS : One mat will be sent in either blue, red or green colour. 1 X Random Color Will Be Sent
